meaning: conj.和,及,并,然后,接着又 /conj.及(或)
examples: America and her partners are helping to rebuild roads and bridges and buildings.
The room was dim and cool and quiet.
I'm tall and thin and he's short and fat.
The First Minister says the resolution to the dispute lies between the employers and nursery nurses.
The First Minister told him that "we need to encourage cultural and behavioural change".
